claim: YOLO demand evidence dispatch implements scope enforcement and cross-check agent protocols with boundary detection, but requires real Claude agent stress testing to validate against dirty working tree mutations.

evidence.summary: VALID_EVIDENCE_SCOPES is defined as Set(['project', 'external', 'user', 'unknown']).
evidence.why: Core scope enumeration for evidence validation.

evidence.summary: Agent prompt hard rule: 'Every evidence record must include scope: project, external, user, or unknown.'
evidence.why: Explicit scope declaration is enforced at the protocol level.

evidence.summary: evidenceScopeErrors function validates each evidence record has a valid scope value.
evidence.why: Runtime validation blocks missing or invalid scopes.

evidence.summary: VALID_EVIDENCE_SCOPES constant mirrors the same four scope values.
evidence.why: Scope validation is consistent across router and dispatch modules.

evidence.summary: evidenceRecordScope function auto-detects scope from path, url, and source fields.
evidence.why: Graceful scope inference when not explicitly declared.

evidence.summary: evidenceRecordHasDeclaredScope checks if record.scope is one of the four valid values.
evidence.why: Explicit scope declaration validation.

evidence.summary: evidenceRecordHasProjectLocator validates project-scoped evidence has a repo-relative path.
evidence.why: Project facts require concrete file locators, not URLs.

evidence.summary: evidenceScopeSummary returns whether results have project, external, or unknown scopes.
evidence.why: Scope analysis is used for readiness validation.

evidence.summary: projectEvidenceBlockingIssues blocks when project facts lack project-scoped evidence with locators.
evidence.why: PROJECT_FACT_REQUIRES_PROJECT_EVIDENCE and PROJECT_EVIDENCE_PATH_REQUIRED blockers enforce scope discipline.

evidence.summary: normalizeAgentResult adds EVIDENCE_SCOPE_REQUIRED blocker when evidence lacks valid scope.
evidence.why: Agent results are normalized and blocked before readiness evaluation.

evidence.summary: Test case: 'external-only evidence cannot satisfy existing project facts'.
evidence.why: Demonstrates external scope is explicitly blocked from supporting project facts.

evidence.summary: Test case: 'project evidence requires a concrete project locator'.
evidence.why: Validates project scope without path generates PROJECT_EVIDENCE_PATH_REQUIRED blocker.

evidence.summary: Test case: 'external URLs cannot be relabeled as project evidence'.
evidence.why: Prevents agents from mislabeling external URLs as project-scoped.

evidence.summary: Test case: 'evidence records must declare valid scope explicitly'.
evidence.why: EVIDENCE_SCOPE_REQUIRED blocker fires when scope field is missing.

evidence.summary: Test case: 'agent evidence without explicit scope is blocked during normalization'.
evidence.why: Dispatch runtime normalizes agent results and blocks missing scopes.

evidence.summary: buildBoundarySnapshot creates file hash map before agent execution.
evidence.why: Baseline for detecting project mutations during evidence gathering.

evidence.summary: diffBoundarySnapshots compares before/after hashes to detect additions, modifications, deletions.
evidence.why: Detects any project file changes outside allowed artifact roots.

evidence.summary: After agent execution, boundary diff generates BOUNDARY_PROJECT_MUTATION blockers for changes.
evidence.why: Project mutations by agents block PRD readiness even when evidence results pass.

evidence.summary: Test case: 'boundary blocks project file mutation even when agent results pass'.
evidence.why: Agents that write project files get blocked regardless of evidence quality.

evidence.summary: Test case: 'git-backed boundary detects untracked project mutations'.
evidence.why: Git ls-files + file walk detects mutations including untracked files.

evidence.summary: DEMAND_EVIDENCE_AGENT_PROTOCOLS defines explorer, cross-checker, and verifier protocols.
evidence.why: Cross-check policy requires three independent agents with distinct objectives.

evidence.summary: inspectEvidenceAgreement detects conflicts when agents disagree on claims.
evidence.why: EVIDENCE_AGENT_CONFLICT blocker prevents averaging contradictory evidence.

evidence.summary: requiredEvidenceRoles returns [explorer, cross-checker, verifier] for cross_check policy.
evidence.why: Cross-check policy demands three independent evidence agents.

evidence.summary: execution_policy.boundary sets project_mutation: forbidden with allowed_write_roots.
evidence.why: Dispatch plan explicitly forbids project file modifications.

assumptions: The demand's reference to 'dirty working tree' implies the current repository has uncommitted changes that could affect boundary detection accuracy.
Real Claude -p agent stress testing would reveal edge cases in scope enforcement that fake agent mocks do not catch.
risks: Git-backed boundary detection may behave differently in dirty working trees with staged but uncommitted changes.
Claude agents may generate evidence records with malformed scope values that current validation does not catch.
Real agent providers may produce JSON formats that current repair logic cannot handle.
missing: Actual test run of evidence dispatch with real Claude agents against the current repository state.
Evidence that boundary detection correctly handles gitignored files in dirty working trees.
Verification that scope auto-detection handles all edge cases real agents produce.

result.notes: Evidence scope enforcement is implemented across router, dispatch, and tests. Cross-check agent protocol is defined with conflict detection. Boundary detection prevents project mutations. However, the demand explicitly requires real Claude agent stress testing which has not been verified by this explorer - only code, test, and protocol analysis was performed.
